task_summaries.task_scope: Analyze correlation stability of identified feature pairs across multiple temporal segments within the dataset to detect stable or unstable dependency patterns.
Compare dependency profiles of feature pairs before and after preprocessing steps to clarify if dependencies originate from inherent data or transformations.
Assess whether identified dependencies align with known protocol relationships or data transformations by contextualizing dependency patterns within domain knowledge.
Evaluate impact of strong linear dependencies on effective feature dimensionality and potential model bias by verifying redundancy and shortcut-like signals in involved features.
